case_metadata.user_request: Find the lowest-energy adsorption configuration for NNH on the provided surface.
case_metadata.notes: Cu3Ag NNH benchmark; dissociation observed before

plan.reasoning: History shows ontop sites lead to dissociation or slip (unstable). The current best stable adsorption is hollow Cu-Cu-Cu at E=-1.741 eV. To systematically explore remaining high-symmetry options on this alloy surface, test a bridge site (Cu-Cu) using the radical N atom (index 0) as ReactiveSpecies. This follows site availability and avoids previously failed ontop environments.

plan.reasoning: History analysis: ontop Cu dissociated (E=-2.589), ontop Ag slipped (E=-2.091), hollow Cu3 slipped (E=-1.741), bridge Cu-Cu unstable and slipped to hollow Cu3 (E=-2.165, current best). Cu-Cu sites are explicitly forbidden. SMILES [N]=[NH] has radical on N index 0, so ReactiveSpecies with adsorbate_binding_indices=[0]. Surface heterogeneity suggests trying Hollow-3 Ag-Cu-Cu environment (still allowed) to potentially improve on -2.165 eV. No convergence or degeneracy tags observed.
